name: talamus
description: Local-first, source-grounded memory with bitemporal history and provenance for AI agents.
long_description: Talamus gives AI agents a durable local memory stored as readable Markdown. It preserves source provenance and bitemporal history, offers zero-cost lexical recall, and gates uncertain corrections through a review queue.

brain_directory.title: Talamus brain folder
brain_directory.description: Choose the local folder where Talamus should read and store this agent's memory.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the local brain for notes relevant to a query.

tools.name: read_note
tools.description: Read a note or one of its historical versions.

tools.name: ask
tools.description: Answer a question with citations using the configured LLM provider.

tools.name: verify
tools.description: Check a note against its original source using the configured LLM provider.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Retrieve relevant note context without an LLM call.

tools.name: neighbors
tools.description: Show concepts connected to a concept in the brain.

tools.name: history
tools.description: List the past versions of a note.

tools.name: sources
tools.description: Show the recorded sources and locators for a note.

tools.name: ontology_status
tools.description: Show the state and coverage of the emergent type system.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Save an important insight or decision into the brain.

tools.name: ingest_text
tools.description: Compile selected text into brain notes.

tools.name: propose_note
tools.description: Put uncertain knowledge into the human review queue.

tools.name: review_apply
tools.description: Apply an approved review item while preserving history.

tools.name: review_reject
tools.description: Reject a review item and retain the decision record.
